commands.review_summary:
The branch threads an already loaded pluginMetadataSnapshot through external-auth provider plugin resolution and adds a provider-runtime regression test for that handoff.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +50. Total +56 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main loads a metadata snapshot, derives external-auth plugin ids, then calls resolveProviderPluginsForHooks without forwarding that snapshot, while the downstream resolver reloads when no snapshot is supplied. I did not run a live sandbox/provider-auth repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance, not an automation-safe code repair.
